steps.title: Show the LiDAR result
steps.content: The previous sentence says some parts of Tikal are physically inaccessible because stones are intertwined with tree roots. The next sentence explains the result: LiDAR's penetrating light waves were the only way to reveal some unknown aspects.

steps.title: Reject noncausal transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals similarity, not result. Choice B gives a time sequence, but the point is not what happened afterward. Choice D introduces a specific detail, not a consequence. The needed transition means therefore. The answer is C.
